events.name: Borussia Mönchengladbach at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Eintracht Frankfurt routed Bayern Munich 5-1 to deal the 11-time defending champion its first Bundesliga defeat of the season on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern thrashed 5-1 in shock loss to Frankfurt

video.headline: Frankfurt embarrass Bayern Munich in 5-1 thrashing

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Frankfurt embarrass Bayern Munich in 5-1 thrashing) Bundesliga 2023/12/09 US ONLY

headlines.description: Visitors RB Leipzig beat 10-man Borussia Dortmund 3-2 in the Bundesliga on Saturday to tighten their grip on fourth place and put a further dent in their opponents' title hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig edge 10-man Dortmund in battle for 4th

video.headline: Leipzig edges 10-man Dortmund in Bundesliga classic
